calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2026 Continued To Feb-03-27 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Appointing Referee
Off Calendar Feb-25-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, SOLELY IN ITS CAPACITY AS TRUSTEE'S Motion For Order Appointing Referee.

The unopposed motion for appointment of Hon. David A. Garcia (ret.) as referee is granted. (Code Civ. Proc., sec. 638.) Judge Garcia's contact information is JAMS, 2 Embarcadero Center, Ste 1500, San Francisco, CA 94111, (415) 774-2607. His state bar number is 48963. The reference covers all issues in dispute. Pursuant ot Section 12 of the Guaranty of Recourse Obligations, defendant Robert A. Rosania shall be solely responsible to pay all fees and expenses of reference. The use of court facilities or peronnel is not authorized by this order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2026 Continued To May-06-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
